entity: 1996 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Allen Iverson (PHI; 'The Answer', 2000-01 MVP, one of the most decorated scorers ever)
notes: Allen Iverson was the #1 pick out of Georgetown. The 1996 draft is widely considered the greatest draft class of all time, also including Kobe Bryant (#13), Steve Nash (#15), Ray Allen (#5), and Stephon Marbury (#4).
